message:
feat(core): add tiered scrollback memory hierarchy types (ft-2p9cb.3.3.1)

ScrollbackTier (Hot/Warm/Cold) with monotonic demotion, TierConfig,
TierMigrationPolicy, TieredScrollbackManager with ingest/migrate/evict,
ScrollbackDegradation detection, and 27 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
